prompt: Run work-do on Task 1 (rotate_secret helper) — bd task id is in .work-do-task-ids.json. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.

assertions.text: Agent ran bd show on the target task id
Agent claimed the task — bd state shows it as in_progress (or was set to in_progress at some point)
Agent wrote tests under tests/lib/ (new test file or modifications)
Agent wrote implementation in src/lib/vault.py (rotate_secret added)
Agent left the task at status: in_progress (NOT closed) — closing is reviewer's job
Agent recorded evidence in bd task notes (IMPLEMENTED: ... pattern OR similar evidence block)
Agent did NOT file unrelated work outside Task 1 scope (no silent expansion to set_timeout fix, etc.)
